name: Mike Sullivan Golf School
about: The Mike Sullivan Golf School is an indoor training facility located in Garner, NC. It specializes in golf instruction using state-of-the-art technology, including Flightscope 3D Doppler Radar and OnForm teaching software, in a climate-controlled environment. The venue offers a mix of private lessons, group classes, and simulator rentals, catering to players from beginners to advanced skill levels with various membership and pricing options available.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art teaching technology including Flightscope radar
Climate-controlled indoor studio for all-weather practice
Variety of lesson options from private to group classes for all skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: No food service is mentioned on the website.
No alcohol service is mentioned on the website.

simulator_hardware.notes: Mentioned as part of their teaching technology, but model not specified.

faq.question: Do I need my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to bring your own golf clubs to use for lessons and simulator rentals.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink service, so it appears outside food and drinks are not permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes is not specified, as it depends on the simulator software used, which is not detailed on the website.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the Mike Sullivan Golf School offers junior golf programs, classes for juniors, and special rates for them, indicating it is kid-friendly.
